ios.name: Sorce — AI Job Applications
ios.subtitle: Swipe right. We apply for you.
ios.description:
Sorce automates your job applications. Upload your resume, swipe right on jobs you like, and our AI agent fills out the application forms for you — accurately and instantly.

HOW IT WORKS:
1. Upload your resume (PDF)
2. Browse jobs in your swipe feed
3. Swipe right to apply — Sorce handles the rest
4. Get notified when your application is submitted
5. Answer any follow-up questions the form needs

WHY SORCE:
• Save 10+ hours per week on job applications
• Apply to 10x more jobs with zero extra effort
• AI understands your resume and fills forms correctly
• Real-time status updates and push notifications
• Smart hold questions when the agent needs your input

PLANS:
• FREE: 25 applications per month
• PRO ($29/mo): 200 applications, priority processing, analytics

Sorce is built for job seekers who want to maximize their chances without the soul-crushing grind of filling out the same forms over and over.
ios.keywords: job application,auto apply,AI apply,job search,resume,apply jobs,automation,career,job hunt,application filler
ios.promotional_text: New: Push notifications when your applications are submitted! Refer friends and both get 5 free apps.
